name: musifer-11ty-cms
description: Eleventy site with file-based CMS validation and indexing tools.

scripts.build:css: sass src/_assets/CSS/styles.scss src/_assets/CSS/styles.css --no-source-map && sass src/_assets/CSS/header-nav.scss src/_assets/CSS/header-nav.css --no-source-map
scripts.cms:check: npm run cms:validate && npm run cms:index
